name: Vocabulary Quiz
description: Vocabulary quiz with visual card UI. Includes science and Spanish decks with 10 questions each. The app is a state machine — call next_turn to advance through questions.

tools.name: next_turn
tools.description: Advance the quiz state machine. Pass {deck} to start, {studentAnswer} to submit an answer, {correct} to record the LLM's judgment. The response 'state' field tells you what to do next.

deck.description: Start a quiz with this deck. Only needed to begin.

studentAnswer.description: The student's answer to the current question.

correct.description: Your judgment: did the student's answer demonstrate understanding?
